creator: public2016@hauptsignal.at
text:
Doesn't seem to be a problem with the sysutils/rundeck port. The same error occurs if I'm trying to create the user with the same command like the port:

# /usr/sbin/pw useradd rundeck -u 819 -g 819 -c "Rundeck" -d /usr/local/rundeck -s /bin/sh
pw: user 'rundeck' disappeared during update
